title: blechnum magellanicum var. angustiseta
intro: Blechnum magellanicum var. angustiseta, also known as the narrow-leaved Magellanic fern or Chilean chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a medicinal plant with various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds, due to its medicinal properties. Blechnum magellanicum var. angustiseta is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and its leaves can be used to make a tea or poultice for topical application.
